title: Number Systems, Signed Quantities, and Reliable Operations
description: Reconcile inventory gains, losses, temperatures, elevations, and account changes from mixed records. Learners cumulatively produce a signed-quantity inventory reconciliation through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Classify natural, whole, integer, rational, irrational, and real numbers by the operations a model needs.
Use place value, scientific notation, and powers of ten to compare very large and very small quantities.
Model direction and change with signed numbers and explain each operation on a number line.
